# Abubakkar Sajid - Full-Stack & Backend Developer

> Full-stack developer in Lahore, Pakistan with 3+ years shipping production
> SaaS, backend APIs and AI chatbots. Open to remote, freelance and contract
> work worldwide. Typical reply time: within 24 hours. Timezone: UTC+5.

## Services
- Backend & API development: Node.js, Express, FastAPI, REST, WebSockets, auth
- SaaS product development: billing, dashboards, admin panels, end-to-end
- WhatsApp AI chatbots: WhatsApp Business API + Gemini/OpenAI/Claude
- Web & mobile UI: React, Next.js, TypeScript
- Servers & DevOps: Linux VPS, Nginx, SSL/TLS, Docker, CI/CD

## Selected work
- [ForiSay](https://forisay.com): AI WhatsApp chatbot platform - 24/7 auto-replies
  for e-commerce, real estate and lead capture. Built at Triad Labz.
- [API Test Lab](https://apitestlab.org): SaaS for API testing, load testing and
  monitoring with Stripe billing. Built solo.
- [Madadgaar](https://madadgaar.com.pk): property, loans & insurance marketplace
  with verified experts across Pakistan.
